description: Console SecretBox is a hosted e-commerce platform for hotels, restaurants, spas, and similar businesses to sell gift boxes, gift vouchers, and related products from their own branded online store. Its public site describes commerce, payments, marketing, logistics, and connectivity features, but does not expose developer-facing integration interfaces.
summary: No public developer integration surfaces were found for console-secretbox.fr beyond a marketing site and an llms.txt file; no public APIs, GraphQL endpoints, MCP servers, or CLI tooling were documented.
